projectDescription: A custom DDNet client fork focused on comfort, deep customization, native tooling, and competitive quality-of-life features for DDNet/Teeworlds players.
keyFeatures: 280+ bc_* config variables for granular customization
Native visual stack: Camera Drift, Dynamic FOV, Cinematic Camera, Jelly Tee, Afterimage, Motion Blur, Player Trail, Crystal Laser, Magic/3D Particles
Advanced input system: Fast Input, Delta Input, Best Input, Saiko+, Snap Tap, 45 Degrees, Small Sens
Integrated Voice Chat with VAD, proximity chat, moderation, and per-player volume control
Chat Media with inline image/GIF previews and fullscreen viewer
Client Indicator for identifying BestClient users in-game and in browser
HUD Editor for live drag-and-drop module placement over gameplay
Components Editor with 52 toggle entries, staged apply, and restart prompts
Assets Editor for mixing and exporting custom asset packs
ReShade runtime integration with live shader controls
Music Player with visualizer, HUD widget, and cover art
Admin Panel with fast actions, RCON log, tuning controls, and voice moderation
In-client Shop for entities, skins, emoticons, particles, HUD, audio, and more
Speedrun Timer, Finish Prediction, Auto Team Lock, Hook Combo popups
Streamer Mode with configurable flags to hide server IPs, names, and chat
publicApiSurface: bc_* config variables (276 entries in config_variables_bestclient.h)
CBestClient component (toggle45degrees, togglesmallsens, toggledeepfly, togglecinematiccamera, saverollback console commands)
CVoiceChat component (VoiceModAuth, VoiceModMute, VoiceModRefresh, IsClientTalking, GetClientVolumePercent, SetClientVolumePercent)
CFastActions component (ConOpenFa, ConAddFa, ConRemoveFa, ConFaExecuteHover console commands)
